description:
## app [1.12.6](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.5...v1.12.6) (2026-03-28)


### Improvements

* Silva Tech Nexus UI: deep space dark palette with electric cyan accents
* Animated neon pulsing pill border in greeting section
* Neon cyan card borders and bottom bar glow
* Library rebrand: app.morphe → app.silva (silva-patcher/silva-library v1.3.3)
* Registry updated to SilvaTechB/silva-patcher
